# Data Model: Upgrade speckit commands to Agent Skills format

**Date**: 2026-04-05

## Entities

### Speckit Skill (upstream, generated by `specify init`)

- **Location**: `.claude/skills/speckit-<name>/SKILL.md`
- **Instances**: 9 (specify, plan, tasks, implement, clarify, analyze, checklist, constitution, taskstoissues)
- **Lifecycle**: Created by `specify init`, modified by trait overlay application, regenerated on `--refresh`/`--update`
- **Content**: Markdown with optional YAML frontmatter

### Trait Overlay

- **Location**: `spex/overlays/<trait>/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.{append,prepend}.md`
- **Instances**: 17 (12 trait + 5 ship-guard), all currently append-only
- **Lifecycle**: Static files shipped with plugin, applied to speckit skills during `spex-traits.sh apply`
- **Sentinel**: `<!-- SPEX-TRAIT:<trait-name> -->` (append) or `<!-- SPEX-PREPEND:<trait-name> -->` (prepend)

### Traits Config

- **Location**: `.specify/spex-traits.json`
- **Schema**: `{ "version": 1, "traits": { "<name>": bool }, "applied_at": "ISO8601" }`
- **Valid traits**: superpowers, teams, worktrees, deep-review

## Directory Structure (after migration)

```text
spex/overlays/
├── _ship-guard/
│   └── skills/
│       ├── speckit-clarify/SKILL.append.md
│       ├── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
│       ├── speckit-plan/SKILL.append.md
│       ├── speckit-specify/SKILL.append.md
│       └── speckit-tasks/SKILL.append.md
├── deep-review/
│   └── skills/
│       └── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
├── superpowers/
│   └── skills/
│       ├── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
│       ├── speckit-plan/SKILL.append.md
│       └── speckit-specify/SKILL.append.md
├── teams/
│   └── skills/
│       ├── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
│       └── speckit-plan/SKILL.append.md
├── teams-spec/
│   └── skills/
│       └── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
├── teams-vanilla/
│   └── skills/
│       ├── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
│       └── speckit-plan/SKILL.append.md
└── worktrees/
    └── skills/
        ├── speckit-implement/SKILL.append.md
        ├── speckit-plan/SKILL.append.md
        └── speckit-specify/SKILL.append.md
```

## Overlay Application Flow

```text
1. Find overlay files: spex/overlays/<trait>/skills/*/SKILL.{append,prepend}.md
2. Map to target: .claude/skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md
3. Check target exists (warn + skip if not)
4. Check sentinel (skip if already applied)
5. For prepend: insert after YAML frontmatter, before content
6. For append: add at end of file
7. Report applied/skipped counts
```
